about_item: Soft sided carrier for keeping a pet comfortably contained when traveling or heading to the vet
Includes a Medium soft-sided carrier with a removable, machine washable fleece pad
Mesh ventilation panels provide comfortable air flow and visibility
Front and top openings for easy loading and access; sturdy zippers ensure secure closure
2 connecting top handles and an adjustable shoulder strap for convenient carrying
Wash carrier separately in cool water with mild detergent and line dry completely before use; reshape if needed
Recommended max load of 16 pounds; note: please choose carrier size by referencing animal's length and height. If the animal is heavy, choose a size larger
Before purchasing, please measure pet's length (neck to base of tail) and height (floor to top of shoulder)
Conforms to under-seat dimensions of most airlines

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier to be of good quality, sturdy, and comfortable, with one mentioning it's suitable for an 8-pound dog. The carrier fits well under airplane seats and is easy to fold for storage. They appreciate its functionality, particularly for trips to the vet and flights, and consider it good value for money. The size receives mixed feedback, with some finding it spacious while others say it's super small.

insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality.

examples.snippet: recommend this carrier - it is well made and pet can see in all directions which my critters love - size is great for my 12 lb bengal - can actually...
In my case the bag is seems like a good quality but im sad because even thought i brought a large size it seems more like a medium or small i have a...

insights.title: Fit
insights.summary: Customers find that the pet carrier fits well, particularly noting that it accommodates cats comfortably and can be placed under the seat.

authors_reviews.title: After 3 years: Sturdy and cat loves it
authors_reviews.text: 3 YEAR UPDATE: I can't believe I've had my kitty almost 3 years. I still have this carrier and still LOVE it. She still naps in it sometimes and she likes to jump in and out of it while playing. The carrier hasn't shown any signs of damage! It was a great buy that I highly recommend. The only drawback is that she's heavier so it's not as easy to carry her with the shoulder strap, but that's not the carrier's fault.Edited to add: It's been a few months and I still LOVE this carrier. My cat plays in it all the time and scratches at the sides but it doesn't show any sign of damage. I took her to the vet and liked how she could see her surroundings well while being secure in the carrier. I also walked to the vet and it was easy to carry using the shoulder strap. I really am very glad i bought this and my mom has one now for her cats to play in.Original review: I bought this to bring my new cat home from my mom's house, which involved a six hour car ride. I took it to my mom's and set it open on the floor, hoping the new kitty would get used to it and not be scared to go inside. Well, it was a huge hit with all 4 of the cats in the home. They took turns napping in it, and they played with each other through the mesh sides. I was a bit concerned how the mesh would hold up because the kitten seems to think it's a scratching posts, but so far it's fine.It was easy to coax her in after she had spend a few days with The carrier. The kitten didn't enjoy the long car ride and much meowing and scratching ensued, but the carrier was good and fit perfectly behind the front seats. Now we're home and ever though it's only been one day since her harrowing experience, she's already back to napping in the carrier. I guess it's her safe spot, which is great.I plan on buying another for my mom's cats because they loved the thing. I'll update of it doesn't hold up long tem, but it seems well built.
authors_reviews.author: Shellie

authors_reviews.title: I'd give it 10 stars if there's such option
authors_reviews.text: I was taking my 5-year-old-to-be 19lbs schnauzer to Europe for her birthday and shopping for a good travel carrier that she would actually go in and remain inside. She's a support dog so she's never been in any carrier during US domestic travels and she's been pretty much everywhere in the US. However, while she is allowed to travel in cabin w/o being inside of a carrier, she's required to have tickets when we ride trains together. The cost is about $37 a day, quite hefty. However, as long as she remains in a bag or basket then she rides for free. Before I ended up getting this carrier, i tried at least two other types from Amazon, both are the backpack type and failed. She would fight her life not going in, let along stay in. Finally, came across this crate carrier and was complete life saver, arrived really quickly and surprisingly sturdy as hell. Took about 2 tries to get her go in and quickly became comfortable with it. She would even go in on her own, waiting for treat. The crate has a very firm base and very comfy to sit in. It’s very lightweight and spacious to use as a travel bag when she doesn’t need to be inside. So I ended up using it as my overnighter a lot on this trip. I ran into people at the airport carrying exactly the same bag. This thing rocks, and way underpriced. I paid $28 for it and I believe it should’ve been double the cost considering the material and quality of this bag. Highly recommended.
authors_reviews.author: Niko417

authors_reviews.title: Sturdy comfy but a little small?
authors_reviews.text: This carrier is very sturdy and worked well for my cat, who is about 12 and a half pounds. It looked a little small when it first arrived, but once I put him inside, he was actually able to lay down comfortably. I do wish it was slightly wider, and I still do feel like it’s on the small side if it’s supposed to hold 22lbs. but it still functions well and feels secure during use. The mesh allows for good airflow and visibility, which is great for pets. My cat is a big body, but this carrier is stable enough for him, the color and the design are accurate and the zipper quality seems good so far! The shoulder strap is comfortable. For the price, the quality and durability make it a really good value overall.
authors_reviews.author: Gianna

authors_reviews.title: Muy bonita ami gatita le encanta
authors_reviews.author: Cliente de Amazon

authors_reviews.title: I Love it and My Cat Does Too
authors_reviews.text: This carrier is great! It's roomy enough for a small cat or dog (though if your pet is more than 12 lbs, I suggest the next size up). It's sturdy, but light, and easy to lift and store. The shoulder strap is handy, but not overly long and the padding around the handle is comfortable even with the add weight of your pet. The mesh screen keeps your pet comfy, but is not easy to break through (granted our cats were calm enough not to claw or bite at it (you may need extra lining if your pet is really determined to bust out). I love the dual openings. The top flap is great for when I need to place my cat in or lift her out on trips to the vet or groomer, and when I'm okay with her taking her time she can walk in or out herself through the front opening. I like having a short leash built in so I can clip her harness in and know she can't run off the moment I open the cage. (You can even clip your pet's leash to them first before unclipping them from the carrier to keep pets prone to running extra safe). The fleece lined bottom is soft enough that our cats like to nap on it, and easy to remove and wash. These carriers aren't too bulky, so storage is easy, but they can't be collapsed, so you will need a fair bit of closet space to stash them in (you could always keep other per supplies inside them or just leave them out and open for your pet to sleep in. If you drape a blanket over them, these carriers make good kitty caves). I would highly recommend these. They are so much better than those awful plastic pet crates.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

other_countries_reviews.title: Net groot genoeg voor mijn volwassen kater
other_countries_reviews.text: Mijn kat (een potige volwassen kater van 15) heeft deze tas (de grote variant) inmiddels als vaste slaapplek geconfisqueerd. Hij ligt er graag in en dat past prima. Maar: het zal wat lastiger worden om je kat in de tas te krijgen als hij/zij zich er van nature niet zo in thuis voelt. Want écht groot is 'ie niet.
other_countries_reviews.author: Jasper
